channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah scores four power play goals in 5-3 victory
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists to lead the Utah Hockey Club to a 5-3 win against the Dallas Stars at American Airlines Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump receives a standing ovation as he enters a UFC event in Miami
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — President Donald Trump entered to a standing ovation and cheers from a crowd of thousands attending a UFC event on Saturday night, shaking hands with supporters against a backdrop of fans waving his trademark MAGA hats.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Owen Michaels didn’t hesitate after watching his shot slide into the open net with more than two minutes left to essentially seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four title in its first championship game.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rowdies lose homecoming matchup, but stadium comeback brings hope
item.description: For the first time in seven months, Rowdies fans are finally back home at Al Lang Stadium after the waterfront venue was impacted during back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-ESPN employee Jemele Hill 'disappointed' Dodgers visiting Trump at White House
item.description: Ex-ESPN employee Jemele Hill criticized the Los Angeles Dodgers for visiting President Trump at the White House to celebrate their 2024 World Series victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Prep roundup: Jasir Rencher flips commitment to Washington from Texas A&M, Livermore Stampede rolls on
item.description: Bay Area softball teams battle at Livermore Stampede. Jasir Rencher flips commitment after coaching change. Serra, St. Francis, Leigh, Menlo-Atherton, De La Salle, Bellarmine, St. Ignatius baseball in action.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL great Terry Bradshaw clarifies role in opening jammed plane door after claims of heroism
item.description: A passenger traveling on a flight from Dallas-Forth Worth to Pittsburgh Thursday provided a firsthand account of how a malfunctioning plane door was eventually opened.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump administration visa policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: UConn dominates South Carolina in women's national championship
item.description: A huge win for the UConn Huskies Sunday as the team dominated the South Carolina Gamecocks and made history inside Amalie Arena.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9
